title: polyscias compacta
intro: Polyscias compacta, also known as the Dwarf Neem or Compact Polyscias, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae, native to the Pacific Islands. The medicinal properties of Polyscias compacta include its ability to repel insects and have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and provide relief from skin irritations, making it a popular choice for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Polyscias compacta often involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
